channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-18342] interop: pjdfstest test_chmod_03: /usr/share/pjdfstest/chmod/03.t against lustre failed
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for jianyu <yujian@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/1fbddbfb-a67e-472f-8ec4-a965089075f3

test_chmod_03 failed with the following error:

Test Summary Report
-------------------
/usr/share/pjdfstest/chmod/03.t (Wstat: 0 Tests: 5 Failed: 4)
  Failed tests:  1-4
Files=1, Tests=5,  1 wallclock secs ( 0.02 usr  0.01 sys +  0.68 cusr  1.09 csys =  1.80 CPU)
Result: FAIL
 run_pjdfstest test_chmod_03: @@@@@@ FAIL: /usr/share/pjdfstest/chmod/03.t against lustre failed

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-b2_15/94 - 4.18.0-553.5.1.el8_10.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-master/4581 - 4.18.0-553.16.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

The following subtests also failed:
test_chown_03
test_ftruncate_03
test_link_03
test_mkdir_03
test_mkfifo_03
test_mknod_03
test_open_03
test_rename_02
test_rmdir_03
test_symlink_03
test_truncate_03
test_unlink_03

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
pjdfstest test_chmod_03 - /usr/share/pjdfstest/chmod/03.t against lustre failed
item.summary: interop: pjdfstest test_chmod_03: /usr/share/pjdfstest/chmod/03.t against lustre failed

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: Believed to be a duplicate of LU-18343
Yang Sheng thinks this is the same with https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-18343
Many thanks, YuJian. It is a great point for livedebug.

Session lustre-reviews-lustre-master-el8.10-x86_64_lustre-b2_15-el8.10-x86_64-custom finished testing. The cluster will remain available for debugging until 2024-10-18 19:28:54 UTC.
The nodes are as follows:
Clients: onyx-153vm1, onyx-153vm2
MDSs: onyx-153vm10, onyx-153vm11
OSSs: onyx-153vm3

Data collected for this session can be found in directory: /autotest/autotest-2/2024-10-16/lustre-reviews_custom_108372_1001_295c341f-b7ef-47cc-a0f6-933d3d1e1149/
No action is necessary when the debug period expires, the nodes will automatically return to Autotest's resource pool.

Hi ys,
I didn't find the logs under /autotest/autotest-1/2024-10-03/ on trevis. They might be removed.
Just pushed a livedebug patch above to get a test cluster for debugging.

"Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/56714
Subject: LU-18342 tests: debug pjdfstest interop issue
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: b2_15
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 2ed434b0e1bc8a143cd7f5997e809cb7e16b586f

Hi, Jian, Can we collect such lctl dk logs from test cluster?

Test Summary Report
-------------------
/usr/share/pjdfstest/unlink/03.t (Wstat: 0 Tests: 4 Failed: 2)
  Failed tests:  1-2
Files=1, Tests=4,  1 wallclock secs ( 0.03 usr  0.00 sys +  0.68 cusr  1.07 csys =  1.78 CPU)
Result: FAIL
 run_pjdfstest test_unlink_03: @@@@@@ FAIL: /usr/share/pjdfstest/unlink/03.t against lustre failed 
  Trace dump:
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6414:error()
  = /tmp/run_pjdfstest.sh:1193:test_unlink_03()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6749:run_one()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6796:run_one_logged()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6637:run_test()
  = /tmp/run_pjdfstest.sh:1195:main()
Dumping lctl log to /autotest/autotest-1/2024-10-03/lustre-reviews_full-dne-part-1_108128_1013_fb650b5d-77ea-4c0e-9939-815c51619fc0//run_pjdfstest.test_unlink_03.*.1728044220.log
CMD: trevis-128vm7,trevis-130vm7.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-131vm7,trevis-74vm13,trevis-92vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /autotest/autotest-1/2024-10-03/lustre-reviews_full-dne-part-1_108128_1013_fb650b5d-77ea-4c0e-9939-815c51619fc0//run_pjdfstest.test_unlink_03.debug_log.\$(hostname -s).1728044220.log;
		dmesg > /autotest/autotest-1/2024-10-03/lustre-reviews_full-dne-part-1_108128_1013_fb650b5d-77ea-4c0e-9939-815c51619fc0//run_pjdfstest.test_unlink_03.dmesg.\$(hostname -s).1728044220.log
FAIL unlink_03 (8s)
flei Would you please take a look of this?

The failure occurred consistently in the following 2.15.5 clients with 2.16.0 servers interop test sessions:
lustre-reviews_el8.10-x86_64_full-dne-part-1
lustre-reviews_el9.4-x86_64_full-dne-part-1
lustre-reviews_el9.4-x86_64_sles15sp5-x86_64_full-dne-part-1
lustre-reviews_el9.4-x86_64_ubuntu2204-x86_64_full-dne-part-1
